$comment: tctc-mcp example config for Sepolia. Primary roles point at the tctc-mcp demo deployment (target redeployed 2026-07-11 with IERC7303): TCTCDemoToken (ERC-721 + ERC-7303) 0x4C0a78803D47154B9C6F42EC4AEbab2D1C94c97D gated by AgentControlTokens (soulbound, issuer-burnable ERC-1155) 0x12342A7F0190B3AF3F4b47546D34006EDA54eE0B, owner = 0x31F8FDf2BA077c0f39852b6daAE028a5A7475d03. COMPLEX_* roles point at the TCTC repo's IERC7303-compliant MyComplexToken 0x873f0bf314A1e0B566015CEf9dA37783A729Fd02 (deployed 2026-07-12) via v0.2 target discovery: no control tokens are listed here — the server reads the bindings from the contract itself. Its certificates are the same AgentControlTokens as the primary roles, so grant_role/revoke_role on MINTER_ROLE/BURNER_ROLE also flips the COMPLEX_* verdicts (one cert, many targets); MEMBER_ROLE is gated by the soulbound ERC-721 TCTC Membership 0x4223260CEf7cbA173C227b1B11E8a6a8Ce2E388a.

MINTER_ROLE.description: May call safeMint() on TCTCDemoToken (0x4C0a78803D47154B9C6F42EC4AEbab2D1C94c97D). Held by owning MinterCert: AgentControlTokens typeId 1 (soulbound).

BURNER_ROLE.description: May call burn() on TCTCDemoToken (0x4C0a78803D47154B9C6F42EC4AEbab2D1C94c97D). Held by owning BurnerCert: AgentControlTokens typeId 2 (soulbound).

COMPLEX_MINTER_ROLE.description: MINTER_ROLE of MyComplexToken (0x873f0bf314A1e0B566015CEf9dA37783A729Fd02), resolved via IERC7303 discovery: the contract itself reports an OR over AgentControlTokens typeId 1 (MinterCert) and typeId 3 (PartnerMinterCert). Note: safeMint() additionally requires COMPLEX_MEMBER_ROLE (AND at the target contract).

COMPLEX_MEMBER_ROLE.description: MEMBER_ROLE of MyComplexToken, resolved via IERC7303 discovery: gated by the soulbound ERC-721 TCTC Membership 0x4223260CEf7cbA173C227b1B11E8a6a8Ce2E388a.

COMPLEX_BURNER_ROLE.description: BURNER_ROLE of MyComplexToken, resolved via IERC7303 discovery: gated by AgentControlTokens typeId 2 (BurnerCert).
